overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a narrative game showing a character exploring a foggy waterfront pier at sunset. The character walks through wooden covered walkways, along open docks with moored boats, past a boat yard entrance, and along a lakeside path while the environment glows with intense orange sunset light reflecting off calm water.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden ferry pier with benches and signage

events.description: exits covered pier structure into open waterfront area with wooden buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through covered pier toward the waterfront exit

entered.detail: wooden roof structure with exposed beams creating dappled light
white signboard with black text showing ferry schedules
simple wooden slatted benches under the covered roof
thick wooden posts supporting the pier roof structure

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered wooden pier structure with benches and a ferry times sign visible. The space is dimly lit with warm sunset light filtering through the sides. At 4 seconds, the character emerges from under the cover into the open waterfront area where wooden buildings and a speed limit sign become visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront pier with moored boats and wooden boathouses

events.description: character approaches and passes a man standing by the railing overlooking the water
character slows and stops at railing to look at a partially submerged boat in the water

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront railing observing the foggy water and moored boats

notable_agents.action: man in hat standing with arms crossed near railing watching the water

entered.detail: two-story wooden building on stilts with weathered siding
white rectangular traffic sign with black text reading SPEED LIMIT 20
silver metal safety railing along the pier edge
small boats tied to the dock partially obscured by fog
calm lake water reflecting the orange sunset light

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an open waterfront pier with wooden boathouses on the left and calm water on the right. A man stands by the railing watching the water. The character passes him and continues to a spot where a sunken boat is visible in the foggy water, stopping briefly to observe before continuing along the dock.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pier walkway with stairs and benches

events.description: character turns around and walks back toward the covered pier structure
exits covered pier to street area with parked vehicles and buildings

agents.ego_description: turning around at the pier end and walking back through the covered structure

entered.detail: returning under the wooden roof structure of the pier
set of wooden steps leading up into the covered walkway
small wooden structure with red life preserver ring mounted on it

segments.scene_description: The character turns around at the end of the pier and walks back toward the covered structure, ascending wooden stairs into the sheltered walkway. The character passes wooden benches and a life preserver box before exiting the covered area at 27 seconds into a street area with parked vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: roadside parking area with wooden buildings and boat yard entrance

events.description: character passes dead end sign and enters Billy's Boat Yard area
ambient light shifts to deeper red as sun continues setting below horizon

agents.ego_description: walking along the roadside past parked vehicles toward the boat yard entrance

entered.detail: rustic wooden structures with porches and lit windows
white delivery van parked on the side of the road
yellow sedan parked near the wooden buildings
yellow diamond-shaped sign with black text reading DEAD END
wooden sign with white text reading BILLY'S BOAT YARD
weathered wooden picket fence lining the property

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a roadside area with wooden buildings and parked vehicles including a white van and yellow car. The character passes a dead end sign and enters Billy's Boat Yard, where the lighting shifts to an even deeper orange-red as the sun continues to set.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront path at sunset overlooking calm lake with mountain backdrop

events.description: character stops at railing to observe the sunset reflection on the water
sun dips lower creating intense orange reflection path on water surface

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront dirt path toward the setting sun over the mountains

entered.detail: bright orange sun sitting low on the horizon over the calm lake
dark mountain range visible against the orange sky
electrical equipment boxes near the path railing
dense evergreen trees lining the far shore of the lake

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt waterfront path with the sun setting directly ahead over the calm lake, creating a brilliant orange reflection on the water. Mountains and forests are visible in the distance as silhouettes against the glowing sky. The character stops briefly at 45 seconds to observe the view before continuing along the railing as the sun dips lower.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a sheltered wooden pier into an expansive, glowing lakeside landscape at sunset. It begins within a dimly lit covered walkway with benches and ferry signs, moving forward until the character emerges into the open air beside wooden boathouses and calm, foggy water. As the camera passes a man by the railing and a sunken boat, it eventually turns back toward the shelter, ascending wooden stairs and exiting the covered area into a street lined with parked vehicles. The scene then shifts toward Billy's Boat Yard, where the lighting deepens into a rich orange-red as the character moves past a dead end sign. Finally, the path opens onto a dirt waterfront trail where the sun sets directly ahead, casting a brilliant orange reflection across the lake against a silhouette of distant mountains and forests.
